arts.ttl: ‘Much higher offer’ from Tottenham saw Spurs ruin plans – Couldn’t compete with them
arts.sum: Juventus and Wolverhampton Wanderers showed keen interest in Kevin Danso before he moved to Tottenham Hotspur on February 2nd. The Serie A side and Wolves made advances, but Spurs were successful in completing the centre-back’s signing in the end on loan with an obligation to buy. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Tottenham Carabao Cup semi-final second leg simulated to predict cup fate
arts.sum: Lucas Bergvall scored the only goal of the game as Spurs beat Liverpool 1-0 in the first leg, meaning the Lilywhites take their narrow lead into the second leg at Anfield later today. Tottenham have the chance to reach their first cup final since 2021 later today as Ange Postecoglou's side take on Liverpool in the second leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final tie.
